use_cases: Displaying real-time file upload progress with percentage and progress bar
Showing success confirmation after completed uploads with checkmark icon
Presenting error states when uploads fail with retry options
Providing actionable upload cards with primary and secondary button controls
Enabling users to cancel uploads via the close button
ai_summary: A reusable upload status card component that displays real-time upload progress with percentage indicators and progress bars. The card handles three states: uploading (blue), success (green), and error (red), each with appropriate status icons and color coding. Includes action buttons for primary and secondary interactions, making it suitable for SaaS applications, e-commerce platforms, and content management systems requiring file upload workflows.
